title: Thermal spray coatings in batteries, electrolyzers and solid oxide electrochemical systems
authors: Amrinder Mehta, Hitesh Vasudev, Jashanpreet Singh, Gurbhej Singh
abstract: Energy systems based on electrochemically active materials frequently suffer from poor performance and limited lifetimes due to interfacial problems that can be mitigated by micro- to nanoscale structuring with thermal spray coatings (TSC). This review synthesizes existing knowledge and develops a process-structure-property framework that uniquely links TSC process parameters to the coating microstructure and interfacial chemistry across different electrochemical systems, with a focus on innovative cross-system design principles. This review covers various TSC technologies (atmospheric plasma spray, suspension plasma spray, high-velocity oxy-fuel, and cold spray) with reference to their ability to control porosity and phase distribution. These process parameters affect ion or electron conduction, interfacial resistance, and mechanical stability. The issues of transport limitations caused by porosity, inter-splat bonding, and non-equilibrium phase transformations were studied. Functionally graded interfaces, adaptive coating systems, and machine learning-based process development are innovative approaches investi­gated to achieve defect-tolerant functional interfaces. This study offers guidelines for designing next-generation TSC that are more durable, scalable, and exhibit better electro­chemical properties, thereby improving the performance and lifespan of electrochemical energy systems. The battery, proton exchange membrane, alkaline fuel cells and solid oxide fuel cell/solid oxide electrolysis cell systems were analysed with respect to one another to establish general process-structure-property relationships for electrochemical interfaces.
venue: Journal of Electrochemical Science and Engineering

infographic.key_insight: Thermal spray coatings can be engineered at the micro- to nanoscale to reduce interfacial losses and improve durability in batteries, fuel cells, electrolyzers, and solid oxide electrochemical systems.
infographic.engineering_relevance: By tuning spray process, porosity, phase distribution, and interfacial chemistry, engineers can create functional coatings that improve ionic/electronic transport, lower resistance, and extend device lifetime.
method: Reviewed major thermal spray routes: atmospheric plasma spray, suspension plasma spray, high-velocity oxy-fuel, and cold spray.
Mapped process parameters to coating microstructure, porosity, phase evolution, and interface chemistry using a process-structure-property framework.
Compared design principles across batteries, PEM/alkaline fuel cells, and SOFC/SOEC systems to identify transferable coating strategies.
infographic.evidence_signal: The paper is a review synthesis, drawing on existing studies to compare process-structure-property relationships rather than reporting new experimental datasets.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains depend strongly on controlling defects, non-equilibrium phase changes, and transport limits, so scale-up and reproducibility remain challenging.
infographic.paper_title: Thermal spray coatings in batteries, electrolyzers and solid oxide electrochemical systems

zh-Hans.title: 电池、电解器和固体氧化物电化学系统中的热喷涂涂层
zh-Hans.abstract: 基于电化学活性材料的能量系统常因界面问题而表现出性能不佳和寿命有限，而热喷涂涂层（TSC）通过微米至纳米尺度结构化可缓解这些问题。本综述总结了现有知识，并建立了一个过程-结构-性能框架，独特地将TSC工艺参数与不同电化学系统中的涂层微观结构和界面化学联系起来，重点关注创新的跨系统设计原则。本综述涵盖了多种TSC技术（大气等离子喷涂、悬浮液等离子喷涂、高速氧燃料喷涂和冷喷涂），并参考其对孔隙率和相分布的控制能力。这些工艺参数会影响离子或电子传导、界面电阻和机械稳定性。研究了由孔隙率、片层间结合以及非平衡相变引起的传输限制问题。功能梯度界面、自适应涂层系统以及基于机器学习的工艺开发是为实现缺陷容忍功能界面而研究的创新方法。本研究为设计下一代TSC提供了指导，这类涂层更耐久、可扩展，并表现出更好的电化学性能，从而提高电化学能量系统的性能和寿命。本文还对电池、质子交换膜、碱性燃料电池以及固体氧化物燃料电池/固体氧化物电解池系统进行了相互比较，以建立电化学界面的一般过程-结构-性能关系。

infographic.key_insight: 热喷涂涂层可在微米至纳米尺度上进行设计，以降低界面损失并提高电池、燃料电池、电解器和固体氧化物电化学系统的耐久性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 通过调控喷涂工艺、孔隙率、相分布和界面化学，工程师可以制备功能性涂层，以改善离子/电子传输、降低电阻并延长器件寿命。
method: 综述了主要热喷涂路线：大气等离子喷涂、悬浮液等离子喷涂、高速氧燃料喷涂和冷喷涂。
采用过程-结构-性能框架，将工艺参数与涂层微观结构、孔隙率、相演化和界面化学进行映射。
比较了电池、PEM/碱性燃料电池以及SOFC/SOEC系统中的设计原则，以识别可迁移的涂层策略。
infographic.evidence_signal: 这篇论文是一篇综述性综合研究，基于现有研究比较过程-结构-性能关系，而非报告新的实验数据集。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升高度依赖于对缺陷、非平衡相变和传输限制的控制，因此放大应用和可重复性仍然具有挑战。

title: A critical analysis of the scratch test for thermally sprayed coatings
authors: Rakesh Roshan, Akash Mishra, Arka Ghosh, Smruti Rekha Swain, Parth Patel, Pankaj Shrivastava
abstract: Abstract Thermally sprayed coatings are extensively used in aerospace, energy, automotive, and industrial applications because of their superior wear, corrosion, and high-temperature resistance. However, the reliable evaluation of coating adhesion and cohesive integrity remains a major challenge due to the complex lamellar microstructure, residual stresses, porosity, and heterogeneous failure behaviour inherent to thermal spray processes. Among the available characterization techniques, the scratch test has emerged as a rapid, versatile, and sensitive approach for assessing coating integrity and tribological performance. Despite its widespread use, the interpretation of scratch test results for thermally sprayed coatings is still fragmented, with significant variations in testing methodologies, failure criteria, and critical load determination techniques. This review critically analyses the scratch test specifically for thermally sprayed coatings by systematically correlating scratch response with coating microstructure, process parameters, residual stress, porosity, and failure mechanisms. The work comprehensively discusses the evolution of scratch testing, different scratching methodologies, operational parameters, and advanced critical load evaluation techniques such as optical microscopy, acoustic emission analysis, and multi-axis force measurements. Furthermore, the study consolidates and compares the findings of a wide range of coating systems processed through APS, HVOF, HVAF, D-gun, and related thermal spray techniques. The novelty of this work lies in providing an integrated and application-oriented perspective that bridges the gap between fundamental scratch mechanics and practical coating performance evaluation. Unlike previous studies that focus on isolated coating systems or individual testing approaches, this review establishes a unified understanding of how coating architecture and processing conditions govern scratch-induced damage and failure evolution. In addition, the manuscript identifies current limitations, inconsistencies in interpretation, and the need for standardization in scratch testing methodologies for thermally sprayed coatings. The present work, therefore serves as a comprehensive reference for researchers and industrial practitioners working toward the design, optimization, and reliable performance assessment of advanced thermal spray coatings.
venue: The International Journal of Advanced Manufacturing Technology

infographic.key_insight: The scratch test is a fast, sensitive way to assess adhesion and failure in thermally sprayed coatings, but its results must be interpreted in the context of coating microstructure, residual stress, and porosity.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For aerospace, energy, automotive, and industrial coatings, improved scratch-test interpretation can help predict coating durability and guide process selection and quality control.
method: Review and compare scratch-testing methods used for thermally sprayed coatings
Correlate scratch response with microstructure, residual stress, porosity, and failure modes
Summarize critical-load evaluation tools such as optical microscopy, acoustic emission, and multi-axis force measurements
infographic.evidence_signal: The paper synthesizes scratch-test findings across APS, HVOF, HVAF, D-gun, and related coatings, showing that failure interpretation varies significantly with testing methodology and coating architecture.
infographic.watch_item: Scratch-test standards are not yet fully consistent, so critical load values can be method-dependent and should not be compared across studies without matching protocols.
infographic.paper_title: A critical analysis of the scratch test for thermally sprayed coatings

zh-Hans.title: 热喷涂涂层划痕试验的批判性分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 热喷涂涂层因其优异的耐磨、耐腐蚀和耐高温性能，广泛应用于航空航天、能源、汽车和工业领域。然而，由于热喷涂工艺固有的复杂层状微观结构、残余应力、孔隙率以及非均质失效行为，涂层黏附性和内聚完整性的可靠评估仍然是一项重大挑战。在现有表征技术中，划痕试验已成为一种快速、通用且灵敏的方法，可用于评估涂层完整性和摩擦学性能。尽管其应用广泛，热喷涂涂层划痕试验结果的解释仍较为分散，在测试方法、失效判据和临界载荷确定技术方面存在显著差异。本综述专门针对热喷涂涂层，对划痕试验进行批判性分析，通过系统关联划痕响应与涂层微观结构、工艺参数、残余应力、孔隙率和失效机理，展开深入讨论。本文全面讨论了划痕测试的发展历程、不同的划痕方法、操作参数，以及光学显微镜、声发射分析和多轴力测量等先进的临界载荷评估技术。此外，本文汇总并比较了采用 APS、HVOF、HVAF、D-gun 及相关热喷涂技术制备的多种涂层体系的研究结果。本文的创新性在于提供了一种集成化、面向应用的视角，弥合基础划痕力学与实际涂层性能评价之间的差距。不同于以往仅关注单一涂层体系或单一测试方法的研究，本综述建立了对涂层架构和加工条件如何支配划痕诱导损伤及失效演化的统一认识。此外，本文还指出了当前解释中的局限性和不一致性，以及热喷涂涂层划痕测试方法标准化的必要性。因此，本文可作为从事先进热喷涂涂层设计、优化和可靠性能评估的研究人员及工业实践者的综合参考。

infographic.key_insight: 划痕试验是一种快速、灵敏的热喷涂涂层黏附性和失效评估方法，但其结果必须结合涂层微观结构、残余应力和孔隙率来解释。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于航空航天、能源、汽车和工业涂层而言，对划痕试验结果进行更准确的解释有助于预测涂层耐久性，并指导工艺选择和质量控制。
method: 回顾并比较用于热喷涂涂层的划痕测试方法
将划痕响应与微观结构、残余应力、孔隙率和失效模式相关联
总结光学显微镜、声发射和多轴力测量等临界载荷评估工具
infographic.evidence_signal: 本文综合了 APS、HVOF、HVAF、D-gun 及相关涂层的划痕试验结果，表明失效解释会随测试方法和涂层架构而显著变化。
infographic.watch_item: 划痕试验标准尚未完全统一，因此临界载荷值可能依赖于具体方法，且在缺少一致测试协议的情况下不应跨研究直接比较。

title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
authors: Sneha Samal, Shrikant Joshi, Stefan Björklund, Mohit Chandra, Akhil Bhardwaj, Jaromír Kopeček
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.

infographic.key_insight: HVAF spraying can produce thick NiTi coatings that retain martensitic transformation and shape memory functionality, but only after annealing to overcome as-sprayed microstructural defects.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a promising route to functional metallic coatings for wear, friction, corrosion, and thermal protection where active actuation or self-adaptive behavior is desired.
method: HVAF sprayed NiTi onto mild steel using four processing parameter sets
Characterized chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, and phase transformation
Tested functional response with 3-point bending, nanoindentation, and scratch experiments
infographic.evidence_signal: The coatings were reported to be 100–300 µm thick and, despite porosity, oxides, voids, and dislocations, still showed martensitic transformation and thermomechanical actuation after annealing.
infographic.watch_item: As-sprayed coatings are microstructurally inhomogeneous and mechanically limited, so post-spray annealing and adhesion/strength control are critical for practical use.
infographic.paper_title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior

zh-Hans.title: HVAF喷涂NiTi涂层：显微组织、相变与形状记忆行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 在工程部件表面沉积各种涂层以提高其在磨损、腐蚀、摩擦和热防护方面的性能，已是标准做法。沉积金属NiTi形状记忆合金涂层可能是硬质陶瓷涂层的一种可行替代方案。NiTi涂层凭借其独特的功能性热机械性能，还具有额外优势。然而，制备厚NiTi涂层被证明是困难的。标准电镀和激光熔覆方法并不适用于NiTi；最广泛使用的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学成分不均匀、且不会发生马氏体相变的涂层，而冷喷NiTi涂层则存在与基体结合不良的问题。在这项工作中，我们报道了首次成功制备出厚NiTi涂层（100–300 um），这些涂层表现出功能性热机械性能，同时与基体具有很好的附着性。我们采用高速空气燃料热喷涂方法，在四组不同工艺参数下于低碳钢上制备NiTi涂层。对NiTi涂层的化学成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变以及功能性热机械性能进行了评估。尽管涂层包含不均匀显微组织、孔洞、氧化物颗粒、高密度位错缺陷和内应力，但它们在冷却和/或机械加载时仍发生马氏体相变。喷涂态NiTi涂层需要经过退火才能表现出功能性热机械性能。尽管其拉伸强度有限，这些涂层在三点弯曲试验中表现出热致驱动，在纳米压痕和划痕试验中表现出形状记忆效应。

infographic.key_insight: HVAF喷涂可制备厚NiTi涂层，在退火后可保留马氏体相变和形状记忆功能，但必须通过退火克服喷涂态显微组织缺陷。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为面向磨损、摩擦、腐蚀和热防护、且需要主动驱动或自适应行为的功能性金属涂层提供了一条有前景的途径。
method: 采用HVAF在低碳钢上以四组工艺参数喷涂NiTi
表征化学成分、孔隙率、显微组织和相变
通过三点弯曲、纳米压痕和划痕实验测试功能响应
infographic.evidence_signal: 据报道，这些涂层厚度为100–300 µm，尽管存在孔隙、氧化物、空洞和位错，在退火后仍显示马氏体相变和热机械驱动。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂态涂层显微组织不均匀且机械性能受限，因此后喷涂退火以及附着力/强度控制对实际应用至关重要。

title: Investigation of Metal-Graphite Coatings for PEMFC Bipolar Plate Using Atmospheric Plasma Thermal Spraying
authors: Guangji Song, X Fu, Haoyi Zhang, Yuehua Chen, Shuiyun Shen, Junliang Zhang
abstract: To realize the commercial application of metal bipolar plates in proton exchange membrane fuel cells (PEMFCs), it is important to develop coatings that are both durable and have low interfacial contact resistance (ICR). In this study, atmospheric plasma spraying (APS) was utilized to prepare nickel–graphite (Ni–G) and copper–graphite (Cu–G) coatings on titanium bipolar plates. This study investigates the effect of different graphite contents on the phase composition, microstructure, corrosion resistance, and electrical conductivity of the coatings. The results show that higher graphite content leads to better performance. The potentiostatic corrosion current densities of the Ni–G and Cu–G coated bipolar plates are 1.05 × 10−4 A·cm−2 and 0.91 × 10−4 A·cm−2, respectively. Similarly, the ICR values of the coated bipolar plates are 25.2 mΩ·cm−2 and 38.9 mΩ·cm−2 before and after cathodic polarization for Ni–G, and 17.4 mΩ·cm−2 and 21.2 mΩ·cm−2 for Cu–G. These results suggest that metal–graphite coatings deposited by APS represent a viable strategy for titanium bipolar plates.

infographic.key_insight: Atmospheric plasma-sprayed metal–graphite coatings on titanium bipolar plates improve both corrosion resistance and interfacial contact resistance, with higher graphite content giving better overall performance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical coating route to make lightweight titanium bipolar plates more viable for durable, low-resistance PEMFC operation.
method: Prepared Ni–graphite and Cu–graphite coatings on titanium plates by atmospheric plasma spraying (APS)
Varied graphite content to study its effect on phase, microstructure, corrosion behavior, and conductivity
Evaluated performance using potentiostatic corrosion testing and interfacial contact resistance (ICR) measurements
infographic.evidence_signal: The best reported coatings reached potentiostatic corrosion current densities of 1.05 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2 (Ni–G) and 0.91 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2 (Cu–G), with ICR as low as 25.2 mΩ·cm^-2 for Ni–G and 17.4 mΩ·cm^-2 for Cu–G before cathodic polarization.
infographic.watch_item: The abstract does not report long-term cycling, full-cell PEMFC validation, or adhesion/wear durability, so real operating stability still needs confirmation.
infographic.paper_title: Investigation of Metal-Graphite Coatings for PEMFC Bipolar Plate Using Atmospheric Plasma Thermal Spraying

zh-Hans.title: 采用大气等离子体热喷涂制备PEMFC双极板金属-石墨涂层的研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 为实现金属双极板在质子交换膜燃料电池（PEMFCs）中的商业化应用，开发兼具高耐久性和低界面接触电阻（ICR）的涂层十分重要。本研究采用大气等离子喷涂（APS）在钛双极板上制备了镍-石墨（Ni–G）和铜-石墨（Cu–G）涂层。研究考察了不同石墨含量对涂层相组成、微观结构、耐腐蚀性和导电性的影响。结果表明，较高的石墨含量可带来更优的性能。Ni–G和Cu–G涂层双极板的恒电位腐蚀电流密度分别为1.05 × 10−4 A·cm−2和0.91 × 10−4 A·cm−2。类似地，Ni–G涂层双极板在阴极极化前后的ICR值分别为25.2 mΩ·cm−2和38.9 mΩ·cm−2，Cu–G分别为17.4 mΩ·cm−2和21.2 mΩ·cm−2。上述结果表明，APS沉积的金属-石墨涂层是钛双极板的一种可行策略。

infographic.key_insight: 在钛双极板上采用大气等离子体喷涂金属-石墨涂层，可同时改善耐腐蚀性和界面接触电阻，且更高的石墨含量带来更好的综合性能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为制备轻质钛双极板提供了一条实用的涂层路线，有助于实现更耐久、低电阻的PEMFC运行。
method: 采用大气等离子喷涂（APS）在钛板上制备Ni-石墨和Cu-石墨涂层
改变石墨含量，研究其对相组成、微观结构、腐蚀行为和导电性的影响
通过恒电位腐蚀测试和界面接触电阻（ICR）测量评估性能
infographic.evidence_signal: 最佳涂层的恒电位腐蚀电流密度分别达到1.05 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2（Ni–G）和0.91 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2（Cu–G），且在阴极极化前Ni–G和Cu–G的ICR最低分别为25.2 mΩ·cm^-2和17.4 mΩ·cm^-2。
infographic.watch_item: 摘要未报告长期循环、整电池PEMFC验证或附着/磨损耐久性，因此实际运行稳定性仍需确认。

title: Preparation and Mechanism Study of Plasma-Sprayed Metal–Ceramic Composite Coatings Based on Microstructure
authors: Tianle Zhao, Jiantao Yao
abstract: To overcome the limitations of single-phase plasma-sprayed coatings, where ceramic coatings exhibit high hardness but poor toughness while metallic coatings possess good ductility but insufficient hardness, AT40/Al metal–ceramic composite coatings were prepared by atmospheric plasma spraying. In this study, Al2O3–40%TiO2 (AT40) ceramic was used as the hard phase and aluminum as the ductile phase. The effects of Al content (10%, 20%, and 30%) and key spraying parameters, including arc power (36–40 kW), spraying distance (85–130 mm), and gun traverse speed (400–1200 mm s−1), on the microstructure and mechanical properties of the coatings were systematically investigated. The coatings were characterized using SEM, XRD, and EDS, and grey relational analysis was employed to evaluate the influence of process parameters. The results show that the introduction of an appropriate amount of Al significantly improves coating densification. When the Al content is 10%, the coating porosity decreases to 3.2%, compared with 8.5% for the pure AT40 coating. The optimal spraying parameters were determined to be 38 kW arc power, 100 mm spraying distance, and 400 mm s−1 traverse speed, under which the coating exhibits a microhardness of 519.68 HV and a 45.3% improvement in impact resistance compared with the pure AT40 coating. Phase analysis indicates that partial transformation of α-Al2O3 to γ-Al2O3 occurs during spraying, while interfacial reactions between Al and TiO2 lead to the formation of Al2TiO5, enhancing the interfacial bonding strength. The improved performance of the composite coating is attributed to the combined effects of structural densification, interfacial strengthening, and the synergistic interaction between ceramic and metallic phases.

infographic.key_insight: Adding a controlled amount of Al to AT40 plasma-sprayed ceramic coatings densifies the microstructure and boosts toughness without sacrificing hardness, with 10% Al giving the best overall balance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study shows that composition and spray-parameter tuning can turn brittle ceramic coatings into tougher, more durable metal–ceramic layers for wear- and impact-resistant surfaces.
method: Atmospheric plasma spraying of AT40/Al composite coatings with 10%, 20%, and 30% Al
Parameter study on arc power, spray distance, and gun traverse speed
SEM, XRD, EDS, and grey relational analysis for structure–property evaluation
infographic.evidence_signal: At 10% Al, porosity dropped from 8.5% to 3.2%, and the optimized coating reached 519.68 HV with a 45.3% impact-resistance improvement over pure AT40.
infographic.watch_item: The performance gains depend on tightly controlled spraying conditions and Al content, so scaling to different equipment or substrates may require re-optimization.
infographic.paper_title: Preparation and Mechanism Study of Plasma-Sprayed Metal–Ceramic Composite Coatings Based on Microstructure

zh-Hans.title: 基于微观结构的等离子喷涂金属–陶瓷复合涂层制备及机理研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 为克服单相等离子喷涂涂层的局限性——陶瓷涂层硬度高但韧性差，而金属涂层具有良好延展性但硬度不足——采用空气等离子喷涂制备了 AT40/Al 金属–陶瓷复合涂层。本研究以 Al2O3–40%TiO2（AT40）陶瓷作为硬相，以铝作为韧性相。系统研究了 Al 含量（10%、20% 和 30%）以及关键喷涂参数，包括电弧功率（36–40 kW）、喷涂距离（85–130 mm）和喷枪往复速度（400–1200 mm s−1），对涂层微观组织和力学性能的影响。采用 SEM、XRD 和 EDS 对涂层进行表征，并使用灰色关联分析评估工艺参数的影响。结果表明，引入适量 Al 可显著改善涂层致密化。当 Al 含量为 10% 时，涂层孔隙率降至 3.2%，而纯 AT40 涂层为 8.5%。确定的最优喷涂参数为 38 kW 电弧功率、100 mm 喷涂距离和 400 mm s−1 往复速度，在该条件下，涂层显微硬度达到 519.68 HV，且与纯 AT40 涂层相比，抗冲击性能提高了 45.3%。相分析表明，喷涂过程中发生了部分 α-Al2O3 向 γ-Al2O3 的转变，而 Al 与 TiO2 之间的界面反应生成了 Al2TiO5，从而增强了界面结合强度。复合涂层性能提升归因于结构致密化、界面强化以及陶瓷相与金属相之间协同作用的共同效果。

infographic.key_insight: 向 AT40 等离子喷涂陶瓷涂层中加入受控量的 Al，可使微观结构致密化并提升韧性，同时不牺牲硬度，其中 10% Al 具有最佳综合平衡。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 研究表明，通过调控成分和喷涂参数，可将脆性陶瓷涂层转变为更坚韧、更耐久的金属–陶瓷层，适用于耐磨和抗冲击表面。
method: 对含 10%、20% 和 30% Al 的 AT40/Al 复合涂层进行空气等离子喷涂
研究电弧功率、喷涂距离和喷枪往复速度对性能的影响
采用 SEM、XRD、EDS 和灰色关联分析进行结构–性能评估
infographic.evidence_signal: 当 Al 含量为 10% 时，孔隙率从 8.5% 降至 3.2%；优化后的涂层硬度达到 519.68 HV，且与纯 AT40 相比抗冲击性能提高了 45.3%。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升依赖于严格控制的喷涂条件和 Al 含量，因此在不同设备或基体上进行放大应用时可能需要重新优化。

title: Investigation of Mechanical Properties of Various Substrate Materials using Polytetrafluoroethylene Coating Technique
authors: S. Kulkarni, J. Tiwari, B. S. Varma
abstract: Purpose: This study investigated the influence of Polytetrafluoroethylene (PTFE) coating on the mechanical and surface properties of different substrate materials, like Mild Steel (Cold Rolled and Hot Rolled), Aluminum Alloy, and Inconel 600 alloy. The objective is to evaluate coating thickness, microstructure, tensile strength, hardness, surface roughness, and corrosion resistance of PTFE-coated substrates. Design/Methodology/Approach: Prior to coating, substrates underwent surface preparation via solvent cleaning, sandblasting, grinding, and wire brushing. PTFE coatings were applied using a spray coating technique with single-coat and multi-coat deposition processes. The coated samples were cured at temperatures between 380–410 °C. Mechanical and surface characterisation tests, including coating thickness measurement, tensile testing, microhardness testing, surface roughness analysis, microstructural examination, and salt spray corrosion testing, were conducted in accordance with ASTM and IS standards. Research Limitation: The study was limited by variations in substrate thickness, short-duration salt spray testing, and absence of wear testing. Findings: The results exhibit that multi-coat PTFE deposition produced a higher coating thickness than single-coat deposition. Inconel 600 alloy exhibited superior tensile strength, hardness, and surface finish compared with other substrates due to its nickel-chromium composition. Microstructural analysis confirmed uniform coating deposition without significant porosity or segregation defects. Surface roughness values improved after PTFE coating for all substrates. The findings revealed that PTFE-coated Inconel 600 alloy is suitable for high-temperature and corrosion-resistant industrial applications, while coated mild steel and aluminium alloys can be effectively used in cost-sensitive engineering applications requiring improved surface finish and protection. Practical Implication: Coating performance can enhance component durability, reduce maintenance frequency, and minimise material wastage in industrial applications. Social Implication: The use of PTFE-coated substrates can contribute to eco-friendly manufacturing practices by extending material life and reducing waste generation. Originality / Value: This study presents a correlational investigation of PTFE-coated Mild Steel, Aluminium Alloy, and Inconel 600 substrates under identical testing conditions, highlighting the influence of substrate material on coating performance and mechanical behaviour.

infographic.key_insight: PTFE spray coating improved thickness and surface finish across all tested substrates, with Inconel 600 delivering the best overall mechanical and corrosion-related performance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study supports PTFE-coated substrates as a practical route to boost durability, reduce maintenance, and extend service life in high-temperature and corrosion-prone industrial components.
method: Surface-prepared Mild Steel, Aluminum Alloy, and Inconel 600 samples by cleaning, sandblasting, grinding, and wire brushing.
Applied PTFE using spray coating in single-coat and multi-coat formats, then cured at 380–410 °C.
Evaluated coating thickness, tensile strength, hardness, roughness, microstructure, and salt spray corrosion resistance using ASTM/IS-based tests.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports that multi-coat PTFE produced thicker coatings, roughness improved after coating, and microstructural inspection showed uniform deposition without major porosity or segregation.
infographic.watch_item: Results are constrained by short-duration salt spray testing and the absence of wear testing, so long-term tribological and corrosion performance remains uncertain.
infographic.paper_title: Investigation of Mechanical Properties of Various Substrate Materials using Polytetrafluoroethylene Coating Technique

zh-Hans.title: 采用聚四氟乙烯涂层技术研究多种基体材料力学性能
zh-Hans.abstract: 目的：本研究考察了聚四氟乙烯（PTFE）涂层对不同基体材料（如低碳钢〔冷轧和热轧〕、铝合金和 Inconel 600 合金）力学性能和表面性能的影响。研究目标是评估 PTFE 涂层基体的涂层厚度、微观组织、抗拉强度、硬度、表面粗糙度和耐腐蚀性。设计/方法/思路：在涂层前，基体通过溶剂清洗、喷砂、磨削和钢丝刷处理进行表面预处理。采用喷涂工艺，以单层涂覆和多层涂覆两种沉积方式施加 PTFE 涂层。涂覆样品在 380–410 °C 的温度下固化。按照 ASTM 和 IS 标准，对涂层厚度测量、拉伸试验、显微硬度测试、表面粗糙度分析、微观组织检查以及盐雾腐蚀试验等力学与表面表征测试进行了实施。研究局限：本研究受基体厚度差异、短时盐雾试验以及缺乏磨损测试的限制。结果：结果表明，多层 PTFE 沉积形成的涂层厚度高于单层涂覆。由于其镍铬组成，Inconel 600 合金相较其他基体表现出更优异的抗拉强度、硬度和表面光洁度。微观组织分析证实涂层沉积均匀，未见明显孔隙或偏析缺陷。所有基体在 PTFE 涂层后表面粗糙度值均有所改善。研究结果显示，PTFE 涂覆的 Inconel 600 合金适用于高温和耐腐蚀工业应用，而涂覆的低碳钢和铝合金则可有效用于对成本敏感、且需要改善表面光洁度和防护性能的工程应用。实际意义：涂层性能可提高工业应用中部件的耐久性，降低维护频率，并减少材料浪费。社会意义：采用 PTFE 涂覆基体可通过延长材料寿命和减少废弃物产生，促进环保型制造实践。创新性/价值：本研究在相同测试条件下对 PTFE 涂覆的低碳钢、铝合金和 Inconel 600 基体进行了相关性研究，强调了基体材料对涂层性能和力学行为的影响。

infographic.key_insight: PTFE 喷涂涂层提高了所有受测基体的涂层厚度和表面光洁度，其中 Inconel 600 在整体力学性能和耐腐蚀相关性能方面表现最佳。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 本研究支持将 PTFE 涂覆基体作为提升高温和易腐蚀工业部件耐久性、降低维护需求并延长服役寿命的实用途径。
method: 通过清洗、喷砂、磨削和钢丝刷处理对低碳钢、铝合金和 Inconel 600 试样进行表面预处理。
采用喷涂方式以单层涂覆和多层涂覆形式施加 PTFE，并在 380–410 °C 下固化。
采用基于 ASTM/IS 标准的测试评估涂层厚度、抗拉强度、硬度、粗糙度、微观组织以及盐雾腐蚀耐受性。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告称，多层 PTFE 形成了更厚的涂层，涂覆后粗糙度得到改善，且微观组织检查显示沉积均匀、未见明显孔隙或偏析。
infographic.watch_item: 由于盐雾试验持续时间较短且缺少磨损测试，结果受到限制，因此长期摩擦学和耐腐蚀性能仍不确定。

title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach
authors: Selwyn Jebadurai Devaraj, A. Arul Jeya Kumar, A Queen Alice, V Manoj Kumar, S Arokya Agustin, A Sarath Chandra
abstract: Ti-6Al-4V alloy is used a lot in aerospace, biomedical and marine applications. This study investigates the tribological behaviour of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coated and uncoated Ti-6Al-4V alloy by experimental and machine learning approaches. An Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 ceramic coating, approximately 200 µm thick, was applied to Ti-6Al-4V alloy via the detonation gun (D-gun) process under regulated conditions (oxygen flow: 4800 SLPH, acetylene: 2150 SLPH, stand-off distance: 180 mm, particle velocity ∼1200 m/s). The wear behaviour of samples was tested using a pin-on-disc apparatus in accordance with ASTM G99 standards. Tests were conducted under normal loads of 40–100 N, sliding speeds of 100–200 rpm and durations of 20–40 min against an EN31 steel counter face. Scanning electron microscopy demonstrated that coated surfaces exhibited reduced wear and formed a protective tribo-layer. Machine learning models such as artificial neural networks, K-nearest neighbours and random forest were developed to predict wear based on sliding parameters. Random forest proved to be the best choice with less mean percentage error and mean squared error. The results showed that D-gun deposited Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coatings improved the wear performance of Ti-6Al-4V.
venue: Proceedings of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers Part E Journal of Process Mechanical Engineering

infographic.key_insight: A D-gun applied Al2O3-TiO2 coating significantly improves the wear resistance of Ti-6Al-4V, and random forest best predicts wear from test conditions.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical surface-engineering route for extending the service life of titanium components in aerospace, biomedical, and marine applications.
method: Applied ~200 µm Al2O3-TiO2 coating on Ti-6Al-4V using detonation gun spraying.
Evaluated tribological performance via ASTM G99 pin-on-disc tests at 40–100 N, 100–200 rpm, and 20–40 min against EN31 steel.
Trained ANN, KNN, and random forest models to predict wear from sliding parameters.
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM and wear testing showed lower wear and formation of a protective tribo-layer on coated samples, while random forest had the lowest mean percentage error and mean squared error.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on tightly controlled D-gun parameters and the trained model is only validated over the reported load/speed/time range.
infographic.paper_title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach

zh-Hans.title: Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun 涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学增强：一种机器学习方法
zh-Hans.abstract: Ti-6Al-4V 合金广泛用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋应用。本研究通过实验和机器学习方法，研究了 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层与未涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学行为。在受控条件下（氧气流量：4800 SLPH，乙炔：2150 SLPH，喷涂距离：180 mm，粒子速度约 1200 m/s），通过爆轰炮（D-gun）工艺在 Ti-6Al-4V 合金表面制备了约 200 µm 厚的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 陶瓷涂层。根据 ASTM G99 标准，使用销-盘试验装置测试样品的磨损行为。试验在 EN31 钢对偶表面上进行，法向载荷为 40–100 N，滑动速度为 100–200 rpm，持续时间为 20–40 min。扫描电子显微镜表明，涂层表面磨损更小，并形成了保护性摩擦层。构建了人工神经网络、K 近邻和随机森林等机器学习模型，以根据滑动参数预测磨损。随机森林表现最佳，平均百分误差和均方误差更低。结果表明，D-gun 沉积的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性能。

infographic.key_insight: D-gun 制备的 Al2O3-TiO2 涂层显著提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性，并且随机森林最适合根据试验条件预测磨损。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为延长航空航天、生物医学和海洋应用中钛部件的服役寿命提供了一条实用的表面工程途径。
method: 采用爆轰炮喷涂在 Ti-6Al-4V 上制备约 200 µm 厚的 Al2O3-TiO2 涂层。
按照 ASTM G99 标准，使用销-盘试验在 40–100 N、100–200 rpm 和 20–40 min 条件下，针对 EN31 钢评估摩擦学性能。
训练 ANN、KNN 和随机森林模型，以基于滑动参数预测磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM 和磨损试验显示，涂层样品的磨损更低，并形成了保护性摩擦层；同时，随机森林具有最低的平均百分误差和均方误差。
infographic.watch_item: 性能取决于严格受控的 D-gun 参数，且训练模型仅在所报告的载荷/速度/时间范围内进行了验证。

title: <b>Comparative analysis of WC-NiCr, AL₂O₃-NiCr, and CR₃C₂-NiCr metal-ceramic coatings applied by HVOF and detonation spraying methods</b>
authors: A.Y. Kussainov, M.T. Kaliaskarova, I.K. Abizhanova, Y.S. Molbossynov, L.B. Bayatanova, G.Zh. Zhunissova
abstract: The paper presents a comparative analysis of technologies for forming metal-ceramic coatings of WC-NiCr, Cr₃C₂-NiCr, and Al₂O₃-NiCr systems obtained by high-velocity oxygen fuel (HVOF) and detonation spraying methods. The aim of the study was to determine the influence of the coating technology on the microstructure, physical-mechanical and tribological properties of the coatings. The study included analysis of the morphology of the starting powders and the microstructure of the coatings using scanning electron microscopy (SEM) and energy dispersive spectroscopy (EDS). Microhardness was determined using the FISCHERSCOPE HM 2000 system, and tribological characteristics were studied using the ball-on-disc method on an Anton Paar TRB³ tribometer in accordance with ASTM G133-95 and ASTM G99 standards. It was found that the spraying method has a significant effect on the structure and performance characteristics of coatings. For carbide systems (Cr₃C₂-NiCr and WC-NiCr), the HVOF method is more effective, providing the formation of a dense, fine-grained structure, increased hardness, and a reduced friction coefficient. For the Al₂O₃-NiCr oxide system, detonation spraying proved to be preferable, providing higher hardness and stable tribological characteristics. The results obtained allow for a reasonable choice of coating formation technology depending on their composition and operating conditions.

infographic.key_insight: Spray method matters as much as composition: HVOF is better for carbide coatings, while detonation spraying performs better for Al2O3-NiCr.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study helps engineers select the coating process that best balances density, hardness, and friction performance for wear-resistant surfaces.
method: Compared WC-NiCr, Cr3C2-NiCr, and Al2O3-NiCr coatings
Applied coatings using HVOF and detonation spraying
Evaluated morphology, microstructure, microhardness, and tribology
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM/EDS, FISCHERSCOPE microhardness, and ball-on-disc tribology tests (ASTM G133-95 and ASTM G99) showed clear process-dependent differences in coating structure and performance.
infographic.watch_item: Results are process- and composition-specific, so transferability to other powders, substrates, or spray parameters may be limited without re-optimization.
infographic.paper_title: <b>Comparative analysis of WC-NiCr, AL₂O₃-NiCr, and CR₃C₂-NiCr metal-ceramic coatings applied by HVOF and detonation spraying methods</b>

zh-Hans.title: 采用 HVOF 和爆轰喷涂方法制备的 WC-NiCr、AL₂O₃-NiCr 和 CR₃C₂-NiCr 金属-陶瓷涂层比较分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 本文对采用高速氧燃料（HVOF）和爆轰喷涂方法制备的 WC-NiCr、Cr₃C₂-NiCr 和 Al₂O₃-NiCr 体系金属-陶瓷涂层的成形技术进行了比较分析。研究旨在确定涂层制备工艺对涂层显微组织、物理机械性能和摩擦学性能的影响。研究内容包括利用扫描电子显微镜（SEM）和能量色散光谱（EDS）分析原始粉末的形貌以及涂层的显微组织。显微硬度采用 FISCHERSCOPE HM 2000 系统测定，摩擦学特性则按照 ASTM G133-95 和 ASTM G99 标准，使用 Anton Paar TRB³ 摩擦磨损试验机通过球-盘法进行研究。结果表明，喷涂方法对涂层结构和性能特征具有显著影响。对于碳化物体系（Cr₃C₂-NiCr 和 WC-NiCr），HVOF 方法更为有效，可形成致密、细晶结构，提高硬度并降低摩擦系数。对于 Al₂O₃-NiCr 氧化物体系，爆轰喷涂表现出更优的适用性，可提供更高的硬度和稳定的摩擦学特性。所得结果可为根据涂层组成及服役条件合理选择涂层成形技术提供依据。

infographic.key_insight: 喷涂方法与成分同样重要：HVOF 更适合碳化物涂层，而爆轰喷涂更适合 Al2O3-NiCr。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 本研究有助于工程师选择最能兼顾致密性、硬度和摩擦性能的涂层工艺，以用于耐磨表面。
method: 对 WC-NiCr、Cr3C2-NiCr 和 Al2O3-NiCr 涂层进行比较
采用 HVOF 和爆轰喷涂制备涂层
评估形貌、显微组织、显微硬度和摩擦学性能
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM/EDS、FISCHERSCOPE 显微硬度测试以及球-盘摩擦学试验（ASTM G133-95 和 ASTM G99）显示出涂层结构和性能存在明显的工艺依赖性差异。
infographic.watch_item: 结果具有工艺和成分特异性，因此若未重新优化，推广到其他粉末、基体或喷涂参数时可能会受到限制。

title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings
authors: Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, Aiym Nabioldina, Daryn Baizhan, Nurbol Berdimuratov, Gulsym Bektasova
abstract: This study investigates the influence of barrel filling ratio on the microstructure, phase composition, and tribological performance of detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings. Coatings were deposited at barrel filling ratios of 43% and 53% under identical spraying conditions. Microstructural characterization revealed the formation of dense lamellar coatings with low porosity and uniform distribution of Cr3C2 carbide particles within the NiCr metallic matrix. Compared with the coating deposited at a barrel filling ratio of 43%, the coating deposited at 53% exhibited a denser microstructure. X-ray diffraction analysis confirmed that Cr3C2 and NiCr remained the dominant phases after spraying, while a minor amount of Cr7C3 formed due to partial decarburization of chromium carbide during thermal exposure. Tribological performance was evaluated under dry sliding conditions using a ball-on-disc configuration at normal loads of 10 and 15 N and sliding speeds of 5 and 10 cm/s. Wear volume was determined from the geometry of the wear track after testing, and wear rate was calculated accordingly. The coating produced at a barrel filling ratio of 53% demonstrated improved wear resistance under elevated loads despite exhibiting a higher coefficient of friction. The minimum wear rate reached 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N), which was associated with reduced porosity and enhanced structural integrity of the coating. The obtained results demonstrate that optimization of detonation spraying parameters significantly affects coating structure and tribological behavior. The developed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings are promising protective materials for components operating under severe friction and wear conditions, including industrial and high-temperature engineering applications.

infographic.key_insight: Raising the barrel filling ratio from 43% to 53% made the detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coating denser and more wear-resistant, though with a slightly higher friction coefficient.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing spray-fill ratio is a practical lever for improving carbide coating integrity and tribological durability in severe-wear industrial components.
method: Detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings at 43% and 53% barrel filling ratios under identical conditions.
Compared microstructure and phase composition using microscopy and XRD.
Evaluated dry sliding wear in ball-on-disc tests at 10 and 15 N and 5 and 10 cm/s.
infographic.evidence_signal: The 53% coating achieved the minimum reported wear rate of 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N), consistent with reduced porosity and improved structural integrity.
infographic.watch_item: The improved wear resistance came with higher friction, so application choices should balance frictional losses, load conditions, and coating durability.
infographic.paper_title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings

zh-Hans.title: 爆轰喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层的筒体填充率对显微组织、相组成及摩擦学性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了筒体填充率对爆轰喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层显微组织、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响。在相同喷涂条件下，于 43% 和 53% 的筒体填充率下制备了涂层。显微组织表征表明，形成了致密的层状涂层，孔隙率较低，Cr3C2 碳化物颗粒在 NiCr 金属基体中分布均匀。与筒体填充率为 43% 的涂层相比，53% 填充率下制备的涂层显微组织更致密。X 射线衍射分析证实，喷涂后 Cr3C2 和 NiCr 仍为主要相，同时由于热暴露过程中铬碳化物发生部分脱碳，形成了少量 Cr7C3。采用球-盘配置，在法向载荷为 10 和 15 N、滑动速度为 5 和 10 cm/s 的干滑动条件下评估摩擦学性能。磨损体积由试验后磨痕几何形貌确定，并据此计算磨损率。53% 筒体填充率制备的涂层在较高载荷下表现出更好的耐磨性，尽管其摩擦系数较高。其最小磨损率达到 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N)，这与较低的孔隙率和更高的涂层结构完整性有关。结果表明，优化爆轰喷涂参数会显著影响涂层结构和摩擦学行为。所开发的 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层有望作为承受严苛摩擦磨损条件部件的防护材料，包括工业和高温工程应用。

infographic.key_insight: 将筒体填充率从 43% 提高到 53%，使爆轰喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层更加致密、耐磨性更好，但摩擦系数略有升高。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化喷涂填充率是提升碳化物涂层完整性以及严苛磨损工业部件摩擦学耐久性的实用手段。
method: 在相同条件下，于 43% 和 53% 的筒体填充率下制备爆轰喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层。
采用显微镜和 XRD 比较显微组织与相组成。
在 10 和 15 N、5 和 10 cm/s 条件下，通过球-盘试验评估干滑动磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: 53% 涂层获得了报告中的最低磨损率 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N)，这与孔隙率降低和结构完整性改善一致。
infographic.watch_item: 更好的耐磨性伴随着更高的摩擦，因此应用选择应在摩擦损失、载荷条件和涂层耐久性之间进行权衡。

title: Microstructure and Mechanical Properties of Equiatomic CoCrFeNiMn High-Entropy Alloy Coatings Fabricated by High-Velocity Oxygen Fuel Spraying
authors: Yedilzhan Kambarov, Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, Laila Sulyubayeva, P. Kowalewski, Aiym Nabioldina
abstract: High-entropy coatings based on CoCrFeNiMn obtained by thermal spraying have demonstrated the potential to improve the wear resistance of traditional materials used in extreme conditions. The aim of the work was to study the effect of the oxygen/fuel ratio when using kerosene as fuel in the HVOF process on the microstructural characteristics of CoCrFeNiMn coatings, including phase composition, microhardness, elastic modulus, and wear resistance. Phase and microstructural transformations in gas-atomized powder during HVOF spraying were analyzed using XRD, SEM, and EDS methods. The tribological and mechanical properties of the coatings obtained were also evaluated. The results obtained are consistent with thermodynamic predictions based on the Scheil model for non-equilibrium conditions. The data obtained indicate the high potential of high-entropy CoCrFeNiMn alloys for use as protective coatings for industrial purposes. In addition, the results of the study emphasize the promise of using thermodynamic prediction of high-entropy alloys using Thermo-Calc software. The best mechanical and tribological properties were obtained in the HVOF 1 regime, which provided a maximum microhardness of 783.8 HV and a minimum wear rate of 7.45 × 10−5 mm3 × N−1 × m−1.

infographic.key_insight: Tuning the oxygen/fuel ratio in HVOF spraying strongly changes the microstructure and performance of equiatomic CoCrFeNiMn high-entropy alloy coatings, with one regime delivering the best hardness and wear resistance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This work shows that CoCrFeNiMn HEO coatings can be engineered as durable protective layers for components operating under severe wear and extreme service conditions.
method: Gas-atomized CoCrFeNiMn powder was deposited by HVOF using kerosene fuel and varying oxygen/fuel ratios.
Phase and microstructure were characterized with XRD, SEM, and EDS.
Mechanical and tribological performance were evaluated via microhardness, elastic modulus, and wear testing, then compared with Scheil-based thermodynamic predictions.
infographic.evidence_signal: The best-performing HVOF regime achieved a maximum microhardness of 783.8 HV and a minimum wear rate of 7.45 × 10^-5 mm3 × N^-1 × m^-1, consistent with non-equilibrium thermodynamic predictions.
infographic.watch_item: Performance appears sensitive to spray-parameter control, so coating quality may vary if oxygen/fuel ratio and thermal history are not tightly managed.
infographic.paper_title: Microstructure and Mechanical Properties of Equiatomic CoCrFeNiMn High-Entropy Alloy Coatings Fabricated by High-Velocity Oxygen Fuel Spraying

zh-Hans.title: 采用高速氧燃料喷涂制备的等原子比CoCrFeNiMn高熵合金涂层的微观组织与力学性能
zh-Hans.abstract: 基于CoCrFeNiMn的高熵涂层通过热喷涂获得后，已显示出提升传统材料在极端条件下耐磨性的潜力。本文旨在研究在HVOF过程中以煤油为燃料时，氧/燃料比对CoCrFeNiMn涂层微观结构特征的影响，包括相组成、显微硬度、弹性模量和耐磨性。采用XRD、SEM和EDS方法分析了气雾化粉末在HVOF喷涂过程中的相变和微观组织转变。还对所得涂层的摩擦学和力学性能进行了评估。所得结果与基于Scheil模型的非平衡条件下热力学预测一致。获得的数据表明，高熵CoCrFeNiMn合金作为工业用途防护涂层具有很高的应用潜力。此外，本研究结果强调了使用Thermo-Calc软件对高熵合金进行热力学预测的前景。最佳力学和摩擦学性能出现在HVOF 1工况下，其最大显微硬度为783.8 HV，最小磨损率为7.45 × 10−5 mm3 × N−1 × m−1。

infographic.key_insight: 调节HVOF喷涂中的氧/燃料比会显著改变等原子比CoCrFeNiMn高熵合金涂层的微观组织和性能，其中一种工况可获得最佳硬度和耐磨性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究表明，CoCrFeNiMn高熵合金涂层可作为耐久防护层，用于在严苛磨损和极端服役条件下工作的部件。
method: 采用不同氧/燃料比，使用煤油燃料通过HVOF沉积气雾化CoCrFeNiMn粉末。
利用XRD、SEM和EDS对相组成和微观组织进行表征。
通过显微硬度、弹性模量和磨损测试评估力学和摩擦学性能，并与基于Scheil的热力学预测进行比较。
infographic.evidence_signal: 性能最佳的HVOF工况实现了783.8 HV的最大显微硬度和7.45 × 10^-5 mm3 × N^-1 × m^-1的最小磨损率，与非平衡热力学预测一致。
infographic.watch_item: 性能似乎对喷涂参数控制较为敏感，因此如果不能严格管理氧/燃料比和热历史，涂层质量可能会波动。

title: Solid Lubricant-Doped Thermal Spray Coatings: A Critical Review
authors: Sibasish Ghara, Rajib Das, P.P. Bandyopadhyay
abstract: Journal article indexed by OpenAlex in Journal of Thermal Spray Technology.

infographic.key_insight: This critical review argues that adding solid lubricants to thermal spray coatings can lower friction and wear while preserving the protective benefits of sprayed layers.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For tribological and high-temperature components, these coatings offer a practical route to improve surface durability, but performance depends strongly on material pairings, process conditions, and operating environment.
method: Reviews solid-lubricant-doped thermal spray coating systems reported in the literature.
Compares coating chemistries, spray processes, and friction/wear outcomes.
Synthesizes design guidelines and gaps for future coating development.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract indicates a journal review article indexed by OpenAlex rather than a new experimental dataset, so the evidence is synthesized from prior published studies.
infographic.watch_item: A key concern is that lubricant addition can trade off hardness, adhesion, and thermal stability, so coating optimization and validation under service conditions are essential.
infographic.paper_title: Solid Lubricant-Doped Thermal Spray Coatings: A Critical Review

zh-Hans.title: 固体润滑剂掺杂热喷涂涂层：一篇批判性综述
zh-Hans.abstract: OpenAlex 收录于 Journal of Thermal Spray Technology 的期刊论文。

infographic.key_insight: 这篇批判性综述指出，在热喷涂涂层中添加固体润滑剂可以降低摩擦和磨损，同时保留喷涂层的防护优势。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于摩擦学和高温部件，这类涂层为提高表面耐久性提供了一条实用途径，但其性能在很大程度上取决于材料配对、工艺条件和服役环境。
method: 综述文献中报道的固体润滑剂掺杂热喷涂涂层体系。
比较涂层化学组成、喷涂工艺以及摩擦/磨损结果。
综合未来涂层开发的设计指南和研究空白。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要表明这是一篇被 OpenAlex 收录的期刊综述文章，而非新的实验数据集，因此其证据来源于先前已发表研究的综合。
infographic.watch_item: 一个关键问题是，加入润滑剂可能会以硬度、附着力和热稳定性为代价，因此必须在服役条件下对涂层进行优化和验证。

title: Corrosion Behavior of Plasma-Sprayed In625 Coatings Exposed to Nitrate Salts in Concentrating Solar Power Plants
authors: Felice Rubino, Vitantonio Esperto, Claudio Munez, P. Poza
abstract: Abstract Thermal energy storage (TES) systems store the energy from solar radiation in a thermal fluid making the electricity produced by Concentrating Solar Power (CSP) plants dispatchable. The operative temperatures of the thermal fluids, usually synthetic oils or molten salts, ranging from 500 up to 800 °C are not compatible with the common construction materials used in CSP components. A viable approach to mitigate corrosion in TES components involves coating the carbon steel with high-resistant materials. In the present work, the behavior of Inconel 625 coatings deposited on T22 carbon steel by Compact Plasma Spray against nitrate salts was investigated. Corrosion tests of coated samples in eutectic nitrate mixture were conducted at 500 °C for 24, 72, 168, 336, and 504 hours. After 24 hours, In625 showed the formation of a thin layer of corrosion products localized only on the sample surface. Longer exposition produced a more pronounced coating degradation with the spreading of corrosion products through the thickness, which reached the coating/substrate interface after 500 hours of exposition. The corrosion rate of coating reached 0.4 mm/year due to the low cohesion of the sprayed splats.

infographic.key_insight: Plasma-sprayed Inconel 625 on T22 steel initially resists nitrate-salt corrosion, but prolonged exposure at 500 °C leads to progressive coating degradation and eventual penetration toward the substrate interface.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For CSP thermal energy storage components, In625 spray coatings can delay corrosion of carbon steel, but their long-term durability in molten nitrate salts is limited and must be validated before deployment.
method: Compact Plasma Spray deposited In625 onto T22 carbon steel.
Samples were exposed to eutectic nitrate salt at 500 °C.
Corrosion was assessed after 24, 72, 168, 336, and 504 h.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports thin surface-localized corrosion products after 24 h, then increasing through-thickness attack over time, reaching the coating/substrate interface by about 500 h and a corrosion rate of 0.4 mm/year.
infographic.watch_item: Low cohesion between sprayed splats may accelerate corrosion and undermine coating integrity under long-term high-temperature service.
infographic.paper_title: Corrosion Behavior of Plasma-Sprayed In625 Coatings Exposed to Nitrate Salts in Concentrating Solar Power Plants

zh-Hans.title: 等离子喷涂 In625 涂层在聚光太阳能电站中接触硝酸盐时的腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 热能储存（TES）系统将太阳辐射中的能量储存在热流体中，使聚光太阳能发电（CSP）电站所产生的电力可调度。热流体的工作温度通常为 500 至 800 °C，一般为合成油或熔盐，这与 CSP 部件中常用的结构材料并不兼容。缓解 TES 部件腐蚀的一种可行方法是用高耐蚀材料对碳钢进行涂覆。本研究考察了采用紧凑型等离子喷涂（Compact Plasma Spray）沉积在 T22 碳钢上的 Inconel 625 涂层在硝酸盐中的行为。对共晶硝酸盐混合物中涂层试样在 500 °C 下分别进行了 24、72、168、336 和 504 小时的腐蚀试验。24 小时后，In625 仅在样品表面局部形成了一层很薄的腐蚀产物。更长时间的暴露导致涂层劣化更为明显，腐蚀产物沿厚度方向扩展，并在约 500 小时暴露后到达涂层/基体界面。由于喷涂飞溅片之间的低结合力，涂层腐蚀速率达到 0.4 mm/year。

infographic.key_insight: 喷涂在 T22 钢上的 Inconel 625 在初期能够抵抗硝酸盐腐蚀，但在 500 °C 下长时间暴露会导致涂层逐渐劣化，并最终向基体界面扩展。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于 CSP 热能储存部件，In625 喷涂涂层可延缓碳钢腐蚀，但其在熔融硝酸盐中的长期耐久性有限，需在部署前加以验证。
method: 采用紧凑型等离子喷涂（Compact Plasma Spray）将 In625 沉积到 T22 碳钢上。
样品在 500 °C 下暴露于共晶硝酸盐熔盐中。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告称，24 h 后仅在表面出现薄层局部腐蚀产物；随后随着时间延长，厚度方向腐蚀逐渐加剧，并在约 500 h 时到达涂层/基体界面，腐蚀速率为 0.4 mm/year。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂飞溅片之间较低的结合力可能会加速腐蚀，并削弱涂层在长期高温服役条件下的完整性。

title: Machine learning in thermal spraying: applications, challenges, and future perspectives
authors: Han Gao, Xudong Nie, Jinyong Xu, Sihao Deng, Hanlin Liao, Chao Zhang
abstract: Thermal spraying is a mature surface treatment technology with broad applications in aerospace, energy equipment, and related fields. The thermal spray process involves complex multiphysics coupling, where traditional methods face challenges in parameter optimization, performance prediction, and quality control. In recent years, machine learning has advanced rapidly, offering new solutions for digital and intelligent research in thermal spraying. This paper reviews the applications and research progress of machine learning in thermal spraying. First, the basic principles of supervised learning, unsupervised learning, and reinforcement learning are introduced, along with their applicability to thermal spraying. Second, the current status of machine learning applications is examined in key areas, including composition design and optimization of powder materials, process parameter optimization and control, coating structure and performance prediction, defect detection and quality control, as well as digital twins and robotic autonomous spraying. Additionally, the advantages and limitations of different algorithms are analyzed. Finally, the challenges in current research are summarized, including inadequate data quality and limited model generalization capability. Future development directions are proposed, encompassing multimodal data fusion, interpretable machine learning, and cross-scale modeling.

infographic.key_insight: Machine learning is emerging as a practical way to optimize thermal spraying from powder design to defect control, helping turn a complex multiphysics process into a more data-driven and intelligent workflow.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For aerospace and energy coating applications, these methods can improve process tuning, quality prediction, and autonomous spraying while reducing trial-and-error experimentation.
method: Supervised learning for process parameter optimization and coating property prediction
Unsupervised learning for pattern discovery in material, structure, and defect data
Reinforcement learning for adaptive control and robotic spraying decisions
infographic.evidence_signal: This is a review paper synthesizing reported applications rather than presenting new experiments, and it highlights that current evidence is strongest where data are available for prediction and control tasks.
infographic.watch_item: A major implementation concern is limited data quality and poor model generalization across materials, spray systems, and operating conditions.
infographic.paper_title: Machine learning in thermal spraying: applications, challenges, and future perspectives

zh-Hans.title: 热喷涂中的机器学习：应用、挑战与未来展望
zh-Hans.abstract: 热喷涂是一种成熟的表面处理技术，广泛应用于航空航天、能源装备及相关领域。热喷涂过程涉及复杂的多物理场耦合，传统方法在参数优化、性能预测和质量控制方面面临挑战。近年来，机器学习快速发展，为热喷涂的数字化和智能化研究提供了新的解决方案。本文综述了机器学习在热喷涂中的应用与研究进展。首先，介绍了监督学习、无监督学习和强化学习的基本原理，以及它们在热喷涂中的适用性。其次，考察了机器学习在关键领域的应用现状，包括粉末材料的成分设计与优化、工艺参数优化与控制、涂层结构与性能预测、缺陷检测与质量控制，以及数字孪生和机器人自主喷涂。此外，还分析了不同算法的优势与局限。最后，总结了当前研究中的挑战，包括数据质量不足和模型泛化能力有限。并提出了未来发展方向，涵盖多模态数据融合、可解释机器学习和跨尺度建模。

infographic.key_insight: 机器学习正成为一种实用方法，可从粉末设计到缺陷控制优化热喷涂，帮助将复杂的多物理场过程转变为更数据驱动、更智能的工作流程。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于航空航天和能源涂层应用，这些方法可以提升工艺调控、质量预测和自主喷涂能力，同时减少试错式实验。
method: 用于工艺参数优化和涂层性能预测的监督学习
用于材料、结构和缺陷数据中模式发现的无监督学习
用于自适应控制和机器人喷涂决策的强化学习
infographic.evidence_signal: 这是一篇综述论文，综合了已报道的应用，而非提出新的实验；其指出当前证据在有可用于预测和控制任务的数据时最为充分。
infographic.watch_item: 一个主要的实施问题是数据质量有限，以及模型在不同材料、喷涂系统和操作条件下的泛化能力较差。

title: Design and Fabrication of Wear-Resistant Coatings Using Thermal Spray Techniques
authors: Vikas Sharma, Vipin Kumar, Sharad Kumar, Ashutosh Singh, Sushil Kumar Jha, Rahul Bhatnagar
abstract: This study focuses on the design and fabrication of wear-resistant coatings using advanced thermal spray techniques to enhance the surface durability of engineering components. Various coating materials, including ceramics, metallic alloys, and composite powders, were deposited onto substrate surfaces through controlled thermal spraying processes such as plasma spraying and high-velocity oxy-fuel (HVOF) spraying. The microstructural characteristics, adhesion strength, and wear resistance of the fabricated coatings were systematically evaluated under different operational conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that optimized thermal spray parameters significantly improve coating density, hardness, and resistance to abrasive and erosive wear, highlighting the potential of these coatings for extending the service life of critical industrial components. The results demonstrate that coating performance strongly depends on deposition technique and process parameters, with HVOF-sprayed composite coatings exhibiting superior density, adhesion, and wear resistance. This study presents a comparative parametric analysis of thermal spray techniques rather than a universal coating framework.
venue: International Journal of Latest Technology in Engineering Management & Applied Science

infographic.key_insight: Optimizing thermal spray parameters, especially with HVOF, can significantly improve coating density, hardness, adhesion, and wear resistance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: These coatings can extend the service life of critical industrial components by improving protection against abrasive and erosive wear.
method: Deposited ceramic, metallic, and composite powders using thermal spray methods such as plasma spraying and HVOF.
Compared coating microstructure, adhesion strength, and wear resistance under different operating conditions.
Evaluated how process parameters affect coating performance across deposition techniques.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports experimental evaluation showing that optimized spray settings improve coating density, hardness, and wear resistance, with HVOF-sprayed composite coatings performing best.
infographic.watch_item: Results are comparative and parameter-dependent, so performance may not transfer directly to other materials, substrates, or operating environments.
infographic.paper_title: Design and Fabrication of Wear-Resistant Coatings Using Thermal Spray Techniques

zh-Hans.title: 采用热喷涂技术设计和制备耐磨涂层
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究聚焦于采用先进热喷涂技术设计和制备耐磨涂层，以提高工程构件的表面耐久性。通过受控热喷涂工艺（如等离子喷涂和高速氧燃料喷涂（HVOF）），将包括陶瓷、金属合金和复合粉末在内的多种涂层材料沉积到基体表面。系统评估了所制备涂层在不同工况下的微观结构特征、黏附强度和耐磨性能。实验结果表明，优化的热喷涂参数可显著提高涂层致密性、硬度以及对磨粒磨损和冲蚀磨损的抵抗能力，凸显了此类涂层在延长关键工业构件服役寿命方面的潜力。结果表明，涂层性能在很大程度上取决于沉积技术和工艺参数，其中HVOF喷涂的复合涂层表现出更优的致密性、黏附性和耐磨性。本研究对热喷涂技术进行了比较性的参数分析，而非提出一种通用的涂层框架。

infographic.key_insight: 优化热喷涂参数，尤其是HVOF，可显著提高涂层致密性、硬度、黏附性和耐磨性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这类涂层可通过增强对磨粒磨损和冲蚀磨损的防护，延长关键工业构件的服役寿命。
method: 采用等离子喷涂和HVOF等热喷涂方法沉积陶瓷、金属和复合粉末。
在不同工况下比较涂层微观结构、黏附强度和耐磨性。
评估工艺参数如何影响不同沉积技术下的涂层性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了实验评估结果，表明优化后的喷涂设定可提高涂层致密性、硬度和耐磨性，其中HVOF喷涂的复合涂层表现最佳。
infographic.watch_item: 结果具有比较性且依赖于参数，因此其性能可能无法直接迁移到其他材料、基体或运行环境中。

title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS
authors: Dastan Buitkenov, Nurkhat Bimakhan, Nurmakhanbet Raisov
abstract: In this work, self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings based on the NiCrFeBSiC system were obtained by air plasma spraying, and their structural, mechanical, and tribological properties were investigated.. The effect of argon flow rate (1600 and 1800 L/h) during coating formation was consideredIt was found that an increase in argon flow rate leads to an approximately twofold increase in coating thickness and a twofold decrease in porosity. According to the microhardness measurement results, the microhardness was 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV, while the elastic modulus was 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa. Tribological tests were carried out using the ball-on-disk configurationAt an argon flow rate of 1800 L/h, the friction coefficient showed a lower value (≈0.107), indicating improved wear resistance of the coatings. Scratch test results showed a high level of adhesion between the coatings and the substrate. Although the critical load values (Lc) were similar for both regimes, the coatings obtained at 1800 L/h exhibited a more gradual and stable failure behavior.
venue: Journal of Surface Engineering and Coating Technology

infographic.key_insight: Increasing argon flow from 1600 to 1800 L/h during air plasma spraying produced thicker, denser NiCrFeBSiC coatings with better tribological performance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Tuning plasma gas flow is a simple process control lever to improve coating quality, wear resistance, and adhesion in thermal spray applications.
method: Air plasma sprayed self-fluxing NiCrFeBSiC metal-ceramic coatings onto a substrate.
Compared argon flow rates of 1600 and 1800 L/h during coating deposition.
Evaluated structure, microhardness, elastic modulus, friction behavior, and scratch adhesion.
infographic.evidence_signal: At 1800 L/h, coating thickness increased about twofold, porosity decreased about twofold, and the friction coefficient dropped to approximately 0.107, with high adhesion indicated by similar critical loads and more gradual failure.
infographic.watch_item: The results are based on only two argon flow settings, so the optimal process window and scalability need broader validation.
infographic.paper_title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS

zh-Hans.title: 空气等离子喷涂过程中氩气流量对 NiCrFeBSiC 涂层结构与性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本工作采用空气等离子喷涂制备了基于 NiCrFeBSiC 体系的自熔性金属陶瓷涂层，并研究了其结构、力学和摩擦学性能。考察了涂层形成过程中氩气流量（1600 和 1800 L/h）的影响。研究发现，氩气流量的增加会使涂层厚度约增加一倍，并使孔隙率降低一半。根据显微硬度测试结果，显微硬度为 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，而弹性模量为 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。采用球-盘配置进行了摩擦学测试。在氩气流量为 1800 L/h 时，摩擦系数较低（≈0.107），表明涂层的耐磨性有所提高。划痕测试结果表明涂层与基体之间具有较高的结合强度。尽管两种工况下的临界载荷值（Lc）相近，但在 1800 L/h 条件下制备的涂层表现出更为渐进且稳定的失效行为。

infographic.key_insight: 在空气等离子喷涂过程中，将氩气流量从 1600 提高到 1800 L/h，可获得更厚、更致密且摩擦学性能更好的 NiCrFeBSiC 涂层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 调节等离子气体流量是一种简单的工艺控制手段，可用于提升热喷涂应用中的涂层质量、耐磨性和结合性能。
method: 在基体上采用空气等离子喷涂制备自熔性 NiCrFeBSiC 金属陶瓷涂层。
在涂层沉积过程中比较了 1600 和 1800 L/h 两种氩气流量。
评估了组织结构、显微硬度、弹性模量、摩擦行为和划痕结合性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在 1800 L/h 条件下，涂层厚度约增加一倍，孔隙率约降低一半，摩擦系数降至约 0.107；同时，类似的临界载荷以及更为渐进的失效行为表明其具有较高的结合强度。
infographic.watch_item: 该结果仅基于两种氩气流量设置，因此最优工艺窗口及其可扩展性仍需更广泛验证。

title: STUDIES OF THE STRUCTURAL AND PHASE STATE OF DETONATION COATINGS BASED ON THE FE–TIB₂–CRB₂ EUTECTIC SYSTEM AFTERPULSE PLASMA TREATMENT
authors: Dauir Kakimzhanov, Arystanbek Kussainov, Indira Abizhanova
abstract: Fe–TiB₂–CrB₂ coatings obtained by detonation spraying were modified by pulsed plasma treatment (PPT) to improve their structural and opera-tional properties. A comprehensive analysis of the phase composition, microstructure, microhardness, wear resistance, and corrosion beha-viour was performed. X-ray structural analysis confirmed the preser-vation of the α-Fe, TiB₂ and CrB₂ phases after treatment, with a simul-taneous decrease in the proportion of γ-Fe and Cr₂₃C₆ and a redistri-bution of boride phases. Electron microscopestudies revealed a densifi-cation of the surface layer and a decrease in interlamellar porosity. Microhardness in the near-surface zone increased from ~15 to 17–18 GPa (by 15–20%), indicating local strengthening. Tribological tests showed a decrease in wear depth, while electrochemical studies revealed a positive shift in corrosion potential by 0.15–0.20 V and a decrease in the rate of anodic dissolution. PPT provides an improvement in mechanical and corrosion characteristics without changing the basic phase composition of the coating.

infographic.key_insight: Pulsed plasma treatment densifies Fe–TiB2–CrB2 detonation coatings and boosts near-surface hardness, wear resistance, and corrosion resistance without changing the main phase set.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The approach offers a practical post-treatment route to upgrade wear- and corrosion-critical coatings for demanding surface engineering applications.
method: Detonation-sprayed Fe–TiB2–CrB2 eutectic coatings
Pulsed plasma treatment (PPT) of the coating surface
XRD, microscopy, microhardness, tribology, and electrochemical testing
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports retention of α-Fe, TiB2, and CrB2 phases, a 15–20% microhardness increase, reduced wear depth, and a 0.15–0.20 V positive corrosion-potential shift after PPT.
infographic.watch_item: Benefits appear concentrated in the near-surface zone, so process control is important to avoid nonuniform treatment or property gradients across the coating.
infographic.paper_title: STUDIES OF THE STRUCTURAL AND PHASE STATE OF DETONATION COATINGS BASED ON THE FE–TIB₂–CRB₂ EUTECTIC SYSTEM AFTERPULSE PLASMA TREATMENT

zh-Hans.title: 基于 Fe–TiB₂–CrB₂ 共晶体系的爆炸喷涂涂层在脉冲等离子体处理后的结构与相状态研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 通过爆炸喷涂制备的 Fe–TiB₂–CrB₂ 涂层经脉冲等离子体处理（PPT）改性，以改善其结构和服役性能。对相组成、显微组织、显微硬度、耐磨性和腐蚀行为进行了综合分析。X 射线结构分析证实，处理后 α-Fe、TiB₂ 和 CrB₂ 相得以保留，同时 γ-Fe 和 Cr₂₃C₆ 的比例降低，并发生了硼化物相的重新分布。电子显微镜研究表明，表层致密化且层间孔隙率降低。近表层区域的显微硬度由约 15 GPa 提高到 17–18 GPa（提高 15–20%），表明发生了局部强化。摩擦学测试显示磨损深度减小，而电化学研究表明腐蚀电位正移 0.15–0.20 V，阳极溶解速率降低。PPT 在不改变涂层基本相组成的情况下，提高了机械性能和耐腐蚀性能。

infographic.key_insight: 脉冲等离子体处理使 Fe–TiB₂–CrB₂ 爆炸涂层致密化，并在不改变主要相组成的情况下提高近表层硬度、耐磨性和耐腐蚀性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法为提升耐磨和耐腐蚀关键涂层性能提供了一条实用的后处理途径，适用于严苛的表面工程应用。
method: 爆炸喷涂 Fe–TiB₂–CrB₂ 共晶涂层
对涂层表面进行脉冲等离子体处理（PPT）
XRD、显微观察、显微硬度、摩擦学和电化学测试
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告称，PPT 后 α-Fe、TiB2 和 CrB2 相得到保留，显微硬度提高 15–20%，磨损深度减小，且腐蚀电位正移 0.15–0.20 V。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升主要集中在近表层区域，因此需要严格控制工艺，以避免涂层出现非均匀处理或性能梯度。

title: STUDY ON THE CORROSION BEHAVIOUR OF PLASMA SPRAYED NANO Al2O3–TiO2– AISI 1020 STEEL COATINGS USING DEFINITIVE SCREENING DESIGN
authors: Elwith J, VijayAnanth Suyamburajan
abstract: In the present study the electrochemical corrosion properties of plasma-sprayed nano Al2O3–TiO2 coating on AISI 1020 mild steel is assessed. The effects of Al2O3 content (2, 3 and 4 wt.%), NaCl concentration, exposure time, temperature and pH were studied with a Definitive Screening Design (DSD) with a fixed amount of TiO2 (2 wt.%). Potentiodynamic polarization and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS) were used on a Corrtest CS350M workstation to assess the corrosion behaviour. The corrosion resistance of the coating with Al2O3 (4 wt. %) + TiO2 (2 wt. %) was the highest with the lowest corrosion current density (2.18 µA cm−2) and corrosion potential (−0.489 V (vs. SCE)), which was significantly lower when compared with the uncoated sample. The results of statistical analysis showed that the influence of NaCl concentration on corrosion rate was about 78% and 72% of the variation in NaCl concentration on corrosion current density. The effects of the coating parameters were compared, and the content of Al2O3 was most influential, with approximately 15% and 21% of the variations in the responses accounted for by this parameter. The minimum corrosion rate was determined to be 0.010 mm yr−1 and the developed models proved to have good predictive power, with R² values exceeding 0.99.
venue: International Journal of Drug Delivery Technology

infographic.key_insight: Plasma-sprayed nano Al2O3–TiO2 coatings improved corrosion resistance on AISI 1020 steel, with the 4 wt.% Al2O3 + 2 wt.% TiO2 coating performing best.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing thermal-spray coating composition can substantially reduce corrosion in mild-steel components exposed to saline, acidic, or temperature-variable environments.
method: Definitive Screening Design (DSD) varied Al2O3 content, NaCl concentration, exposure time, temperature, and pH.
Corrosion performance was measured using potentiodynamic polarization and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS).
A Corrtest CS350M workstation was used to quantify corrosion current, potential, and resistance.
infographic.evidence_signal: The best coating reached a corrosion current density of 2.18 µA cm−2 and a minimum corrosion rate of 0.010 mm yr−1, with model fits exceeding R² > 0.99.
infographic.watch_item: The reported optimization is specific to the tested plasma-sprayed composition and electrolyte conditions, so broader durability and long-term service performance still need validation.
infographic.paper_title: STUDY ON THE CORROSION BEHAVIOUR OF PLASMA SPRAYED NANO Al2O3–TiO2– AISI 1020 STEEL COATINGS USING DEFINITIVE SCREENING DESIGN

zh-Hans.title: 采用确定性筛选设计研究等离子喷涂纳米 Al2O3–TiO2–AISI 1020 钢涂层腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究评估了等离子喷涂纳米 Al2O3–TiO2 涂层在 AISI 1020 低碳钢上的电化学腐蚀性能。采用固定 TiO2 含量（2 wt.%），并通过确定性筛选设计（Definitive Screening Design, DSD）研究了 Al2O3 含量（2、3 和 4 wt.%）、NaCl 浓度、暴露时间、温度和 pH 的影响。使用 Corrtest CS350M 工作站，通过动电位极化和电化学阻抗谱（EIS）评估腐蚀行为。Al2O3（4 wt.%）+ TiO2（2 wt.%）涂层的耐腐蚀性最高，具有最低的腐蚀电流密度（2.18 µA cm−2）和腐蚀电位（−0.489 V（vs. SCE）），与未涂层样品相比显著降低。统计分析结果表明，NaCl 浓度对腐蚀速率的影响约为 78%，而 NaCl 浓度变化对腐蚀电流密度变异的影响约为 72%。比较各涂层参数的影响后发现，Al2O3 含量最具影响力，该参数分别解释了约 15% 和 21% 的响应变化。确定的最小腐蚀速率为 0.010 mm yr−1，所建立模型表现出良好的预测能力，R² 值均超过 0.99。

infographic.key_insight: 等离子喷涂纳米 Al2O3–TiO2 涂层提高了 AISI 1020 钢的耐腐蚀性，其中 4 wt.% Al2O3 + 2 wt.% TiO2 涂层表现最佳。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化热喷涂涂层组成可显著降低暴露于盐环境、酸性环境或温度变化环境中的低碳钢部件腐蚀。
method: 采用确定性筛选设计（DSD）改变 Al2O3 含量、NaCl 浓度、暴露时间、温度和 pH。
使用动电位极化和电化学阻抗谱（EIS）测量腐蚀性能。
使用 Corrtest CS350M 工作站量化腐蚀电流、电位和电阻。
infographic.evidence_signal: 最佳涂层的腐蚀电流密度达到 2.18 µA cm−2，最小腐蚀速率为 0.010 mm yr−1，模型拟合优度超过 R² > 0.99。
infographic.watch_item: 所报道的优化结果仅适用于所测试的等离子喷涂配方和电解质条件，因此更广泛的耐久性和长期服役性能仍需验证。

title: Structural and Phase State and Properties of Gradient and Bilayer Al2O3/Cr2O3 Coatings Obtained by Detonation Spraying
authors: Bauyrzhan Rakhadilov, Aibol Mural, Dauir Kakimzhanov, Zhangabay Turar
abstract: This study aims to compare the structural, mechanical, tribological, and corrosion properties of gradient and bilayer Al2O3/Cr2O3 coatings obtained by detonation spraying on 316L stainless steel. The coatings were characterized using X-ray diffraction, scanning electron microscopy, energy-dispersive spectroscopy, instrumental indentation, scratch testing, ball-on-disk tribological testing, and potentiodynamic polarization in a 3.5% NaCl solution. The results showed that the gradient Al2O3/Cr2O3 coating had a denser and more homogeneous structure than the bilayer coating. Quantitative SEM image analysis showed that the apparent porosity decreased from 1.285% for the bilayer coating to 0.934% for the gradient coating. Instrumental indentation revealed an increase in hardness from approximately 401 HV to 462 HV and an increase in elastic modulus from about 173 GPa to 183 GPa. The gradient coating also demonstrated higher critical loads during scratch testing, indicating improved resistance to crack initiation and coating failure. Tribological tests showed a lower and more stable coefficient of friction for the gradient coating, decreasing from approximately 0.58–0.60 to 0.52–0.55. Potentiodynamic polarization measurements showed that the corrosion current density decreased from 0.50540 to 0.24155 µA/cm2, while the corrosion rate decreased from 0.00894 to 0.00428 mm/year. These results demonstrate that the gradient coating architecture improves the performance of Al2O3/Cr2O3 coatings by reducing porosity, increasing structural integrity, and promoting an improved structural integrity and reduced defect-related stress concentration through the coating thickness. Therefore, gradient Al2O3/Cr2O3 coatings obtained by detonation spraying are promising for applications requiring enhanced wear and corrosion resistance.

infographic.key_insight: A gradient Al2O3/Cr2O3 coating made by detonation spraying outperformed a bilayer design by reducing defects and improving hardness, wear, and corrosion resistance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Graded coating architecture can be used to extend the service life of stainless-steel components exposed to friction and saline corrosion.
method: Detonation-sprayed Al2O3/Cr2O3 coatings on 316L stainless steel
Compared gradient vs bilayer microstructure and phase state with XRD, SEM, and EDS
Evaluated hardness, scratch resistance, tribology, and corrosion in 3.5% NaCl
infographic.evidence_signal: The gradient coating showed lower porosity (0.934% vs 1.285%), higher hardness (462 vs 401 HV), lower friction (0.52–0.55 vs 0.58–0.60), and lower corrosion current density (0.24155 vs 0.50540 µA/cm2).
infographic.watch_item: The improvements are demonstrated at laboratory scale, so durability under long-term thermal cycling, impact loading, or service-environment aging still needs validation.
infographic.paper_title: Structural and Phase State and Properties of Gradient and Bilayer Al2O3/Cr2O3 Coatings Obtained by Detonation Spraying

zh-Hans.title: 通过爆炸喷涂获得的梯度和双层 Al2O3/Cr2O3 涂层的结构、相状态及性能
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究旨在比较通过爆炸喷涂在 316L 不锈钢上制备的梯度和双层 Al2O3/Cr2O3 涂层的结构、力学、摩擦学和腐蚀性能。采用 X 射线衍射、扫描电子显微镜、能量色散谱、仪器化压痕、划痕测试、球-盘摩擦学测试以及在 3.5% NaCl 溶液中的动电位极化对涂层进行了表征。结果表明，梯度 Al2O3/Cr2O3 涂层比双层涂层具有更致密、更均匀的结构。定量 SEM 图像分析表明，表观孔隙率由双层涂层的 1.285% 降低至梯度涂层的 0.934%。仪器化压痕结果显示，硬度由约 401 HV 提高到 462 HV，弹性模量由约 173 GPa 提高到 183 GPa。梯度涂层在划痕测试中还表现出更高的临界载荷，表明其抗裂纹萌生和涂层失效能力有所提高。摩擦学测试显示，梯度涂层的摩擦系数更低且更稳定，从约 0.58–0.60 降至 0.52–0.55。动电位极化测量表明，腐蚀电流密度由 0.50540 降至 0.24155 µA/cm2，而腐蚀速率由 0.00894 降至 0.00428 mm/year。这些结果表明，梯度涂层结构通过降低孔隙率、提高结构完整性，并促进沿涂层厚度方向改善结构完整性和降低由缺陷引起的应力集中，从而提升了 Al2O3/Cr2O3 涂层的性能。因此，通过爆炸喷涂获得的梯度 Al2O3/Cr2O3 涂层在需要增强耐磨和耐腐蚀性能的应用中具有良好前景。

infographic.key_insight: 通过爆炸喷涂制备的梯度 Al2O3/Cr2O3 涂层通过减少缺陷并提高硬度、耐磨性和耐腐蚀性，优于双层设计。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 分级涂层结构可用于延长暴露于摩擦和盐雾腐蚀环境中的不锈钢部件的服役寿命。
method: 在 316L 不锈钢上进行爆炸喷涂 Al2O3/Cr2O3 涂层
利用 XRD、SEM 和 EDS 比较梯度与双层的微观结构和相状态
通过 3.5% NaCl 环境下的硬度、划痕抗性、摩擦学和腐蚀测试进行评估
infographic.evidence_signal: 梯度涂层表现出更低的孔隙率（0.934% vs 1.285%）、更高的硬度（462 vs 401 HV）、更低的摩擦系数（0.52–0.55 vs 0.58–0.60）以及更低的腐蚀电流密度（0.24155 vs 0.50540 µA/cm2）。
infographic.watch_item: 这些改进是在实验室尺度上证明的，因此其在长期热循环、冲击载荷或服役环境老化条件下的耐久性仍需验证。

title: Investigation of Detonation-Sprayed NiCr–Al Coatings Tested under Real Operating Conditions of a Thermal Power Plant
authors: М. Маулет, Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, N.N. Yusof, A.К. Khassenov
abstract: This study presents the experimental results of high-temperature oxidation testing under actual operating con ditions in a thermal power plant of gradient and homogeneous composite NiCr–Al coatings produced by the detonation spraying method. To characterize the degradation mechanisms of the tested coatings, systematic analyses were performed, including phase composition evaluation, and detailed microstructural examination using scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The evolution of oxide layers and elemental redistribution across the coating thickness were also assessed to clarify the influence of coating architecture on protective perfor mance. The experimental results demonstrated that the gradient composite NiCr–Al coatings exhibit superior resistance to high-temperature oxidation compared to homogeneous coatings. The gradient architecture effec tively preserved structural integrity and promoted a more uniform distribution of aluminum and chromium within the coating thickness. This compositional optimization facilitated the formation of continuous and ad herent protective oxide layers, predominantly Al2O3 and Cr2O3, which significantly reduced oxidation kinet ics and inhibited coating degradation. In contrast, the homogeneous NiCr–Al coatings showed noticeable aluminum depletion, crack formation, and oxide scale spallation after prolonged exposure to high temperature industrial conditions. The findings of this study confirm that gradient NiCr–Al coatings deposit ed by detonation spraying represent a promising protective solution for components operating in severe high temperature and corrosive environments, offering improved durability and extended service life for industrial and energy related applications.
venue: Bulletin of the Karaganda University Physics Series

infographic.key_insight: Gradient detonation-sprayed NiCr–Al coatings outperform homogeneous coatings by maintaining a more protective oxide scale and reducing high-temperature oxidation damage under real thermal power plant conditions.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This suggests coating architecture, not just composition, is critical for extending the service life of hot-section industrial components exposed to severe oxidation and corrosion.
method: Detonation-sprayed NiCr–Al coatings with gradient and homogeneous architectures
High-temperature oxidation tests under actual thermal power plant operating conditions
SEM and phase-composition analysis with elemental redistribution profiling across coating thickness
infographic.evidence_signal: Evaluation showed more uniform Al/Cr distribution, continuous Al2O3/Cr2O3 formation, and less cracking/spallation in gradient coatings than in homogeneous coatings after prolonged exposure.
infographic.watch_item: Performance was demonstrated under one industrial operating environment, so durability and scalability should still be validated across different substrates, temperatures, and service cycles.

zh-Hans.title: 在热电厂真实运行条件下测试的爆炸喷涂NiCr–Al涂层研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究给出了采用爆炸喷涂方法制备的梯度和均匀复合NiCr–Al涂层在热电厂实际运行条件下进行高温氧化测试的实验结果。为表征所测试涂层的退化机制，开展了系统分析，包括相组成评估以及采用扫描电子显微镜（SEM）进行的详细微观结构检查。还评估了氧化层的演化及元素在涂层厚度方向上的重新分布，以阐明涂层架构对防护性能的影响。实验结果表明，与均匀涂层相比，梯度复合NiCr–Al涂层表现出更优异的高温抗氧化性能。梯度结构有效保持了结构完整性，并促进了铝和铬在涂层厚度方向上更均匀的分布。这种成分优化有利于形成连续且致密附着的保护性氧化层，主要为Al2O3和Cr2O3，从而显著降低了氧化动力学并抑制了涂层退化。相比之下，均匀NiCr–Al涂层在长时间暴露于高温工业条件后出现了明显的铝耗尽、裂纹形成和氧化皮剥落。本研究结果证实，由爆炸喷涂制备的梯度NiCr–Al涂层是适用于在严苛高温和腐蚀环境中运行部件的一种有前景的防护方案，可为工业和能源相关应用提供更高的耐久性和更长的服役寿命。

infographic.key_insight: 在真实热电厂条件下，梯度爆炸喷涂NiCr–Al涂层通过保持更具防护性的氧化膜并减少高温氧化损伤，优于均匀涂层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这表明，对于暴露于严酷氧化和腐蚀环境中的高温段工业部件而言，涂层架构与成分同样关键，甚至更关键。
method: 具有梯度和均匀架构的爆炸喷涂NiCr–Al涂层
在热电厂实际运行条件下进行的高温氧化试验
结合SEM和相组成分析，并对涂层厚度方向的元素重新分布进行剖析
infographic.evidence_signal: 评估显示，与均匀涂层相比，梯度涂层在长时间暴露后Al/Cr分布更均匀，形成连续的Al2O3/Cr2O3，并且裂纹和剥落更少。
infographic.watch_item: 该性能是在一种工业运行环境中得到验证的，因此仍需在不同基体、温度和服役循环条件下进一步验证其耐久性和可扩展性。

title: Detonation Spraying of Functionally Graded Hydroxyapatite/Titanium Coatings on Ti–6Al–4V Alloy
authors: Aidar Kengesbekov, Daryn Baizhan, Dastan Buitkenov, Nazerke Muktanova
abstract: In this work, two configurations of Ti/HAp functionally graded coatings were fabricated on Ti–6Al–4V alloy substrates using detonation spraying. The coatings differed in the number and sequence of Ti and hydroxyapatite (HAp) deposition cycles, resulting in distinct gradient architectures: Configuration 1 incorporated a sharper transition from the Ti-rich base to the HAp-rich surface, whereas Configuration 2 featured a smoother and more gradual compositional gradient. The microstructure and elemental distribution were examined by scanning electron microscopy (SEM) and energy-dispersive X-ray spectroscopy (EDS). Both configurations exhibited well-defined gradient layering, with titanium concentrated near the coating–substrate interface and an increased Ca and P content toward the upper bioceramic region. Raman spectroscopy confirmed the preservation of hydroxyapatite as the main phase, showing a characteristic 961 cm−1 band. Adhesion strength measured according to ASTM C633-13 was 45.78 ± 4.4 MPa for Configuration 1 and 52.32 ± 6.7 MPa for Configuration 2, both significantly exceeding the minimum required 15 MPa. The findings demonstrate that detonation-sprayed Ti/HAp gradient coatings provide strong adhesion and stable bioceramic surfaces, making them promising for metal implant applications.

infographic.key_insight: Detonation spraying can build strong Ti/HAp functionally graded coatings on Ti-6Al-4V, with a smoother gradient improving adhesion.
infographic.engineering_relevance: These graded bioceramic coatings are promising for load-bearing implant surfaces because they combine a titanium-rich bond layer with a hydroxyapatite-rich bioactive top layer.
method: Two Ti/HAp gradient coating architectures were deposited by detonation spraying.
SEM and EDS were used to verify layer structure and elemental gradients.
Raman spectroscopy confirmed hydroxyapatite phase retention.
infographic.evidence_signal: Adhesion testing (ASTM C633-13) showed 45.78 ± 4.4 MPa for Configuration 1 and 52.32 ± 6.7 MPa for Configuration 2, both well above the 15 MPa minimum.
infographic.watch_item: Results are promising, but long-term in-service durability and performance under cyclic biological/mechanical loading still need validation.

zh-Hans.title: Ti–6Al–4V合金上功能梯度羟基磷灰石/钛涂层的爆炸喷涂
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究采用爆炸喷涂在Ti–6Al–4V合金基体上制备了两种Ti/HAp功能梯度涂层。两种涂层在Ti和羟基磷灰石（HAp）沉积循环的数量和顺序上不同，从而形成了不同的梯度结构：构型1从富Ti底部到富HAp表面的过渡更为陡峭，而构型2则呈现出更平滑、更加渐进的成分梯度。采用扫描电子显微镜（SEM）和能量色散X射线光谱（EDS）分析了微观结构和元素分布。两种构型均表现出清晰的梯度分层结构，钛主要集中于涂层–基体界面附近，而Ca和P含量沿上部生物陶瓷区域增加。拉曼光谱证实羟基磷灰石作为主要相得以保留，表现出特征性的961 cm−1峰带。按照ASTM C633-13测得的结合强度中，构型1为45.78 ± 4.4 MPa，构型2为52.32 ± 6.7 MPa，均显著高于15 MPa的最低要求。研究结果表明，爆炸喷涂Ti/HAp梯度涂层具有较强的结合力和稳定的生物陶瓷表面，使其在金属植入物应用中具有良好前景。

infographic.key_insight: 爆炸喷涂可在Ti-6Al-4V上构建牢固的Ti/HAp功能梯度涂层，其中更平滑的梯度有助于提高结合强度。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这类梯度生物陶瓷涂层适用于承载型植入物表面，因为它们将富钛结合层与富羟基磷灰石生物活性表层结合在一起。
method: 采用爆炸喷涂制备了两种Ti/HAp梯度涂层结构。
利用SEM和EDS验证了层状结构及元素梯度。
采用拉曼光谱确认羟基磷灰石相的保留。
infographic.evidence_signal: 结合强度测试（ASTM C633-13）显示，构型1为45.78 ± 4.4 MPa，构型2为52.32 ± 6.7 MPa，均远高于15 MPa的最低要求。
infographic.watch_item: 结果令人鼓舞，但在长期服役耐久性以及循环生物/机械载荷下的性能仍需验证。
